properties.why: Sentinel-1 SAR detection, confidence 0.86 · length 47 m (industrial scale) · classified non-fishing vessel (p=0.28) · heading about 315 deg at 6 kn
properties.why_full: Sentinel-1 SAR detection, confidence 0.86 · length 47 m (industrial scale) · classified non-fishing vessel (p=0.28) · heading about 315 deg at 6 kn
properties.caveats: A SAR detection is a radar blip: it has a position and a size, not an identity. | Length, heading and the fishing-vessel class are model estimates, not ground truth. | Dark means no AIS broadcast matched at the acquisition time; without an AIS feed the broadcasting status is unverified, not assumed. | An inspection lead, not proof of illegal activity.
properties.caveat: A SAR detection is a radar blip: it has a position and a size, not an identity.
